items.name: 12 Gauge Slug
items.description: 8 slugs for use in the Mossberg and KT Decider shotguns

items.name: 2x 12gauge
items.description: Ammo for use with the double barrel shotgun

items.name: .308 Winchester Sniper rifle ammo
items.description: 7.62x51mm NATO sniper rifle clip for use with the .308 Winchester Sniple Rifle. Magazine holds 10 rounds

items.name: .40 caliber 1911 Mag
items.description: 7 round single-stack magazine for the 1911

items.name: .45 ACP STI Eagle Elite ammo
items.description: .45 ACP 10 rounds magazine for the STI Eagle Elite handgun

items.name: .50 BMG
items.description: 12.7x99mm NATO anti material rounds for M107A1 rifle. 5 rounds per magazine

items.name: 5.45 AK 30
items.description: This is a standard 5.45x39mm 30 rounds clip for the russian AK 74M family of rifles

items.name: 5.45 AK 45
items.description: This is a standard 5.45x39mm 45 rounds clip for the russian AK74 family of rifles

items.name: 5.45 AK Drum
items.description: 100 rounds drum for AK74 and RPK machine guns

items.name: 5.7 FN ammo
items.description: FN (M240) machine gun round magazine. 20 rounds of 5.7×28mm ammo

items.name: 7.62 AKM Mag
items.description: AKM Assault Rifle magazine. 40 7.62x39mm rounds

items.name: 9mm Mag
items.description: "15 rounds magazine of 9mm ammo for use with: B92, B93R and Jericho handguns"

items.name: 9x19 Para Mag
items.description: 18 rounds 9x19mm Parabellum magazine specially designed for Sig Sauer P226 handgun

items.name: AA-12
items.description: The AA-12 gauge automatic shotgun was designed to fire 12 gauge rounds from a 20 round storage system. It causes a reasonable amount of damage per round.

items.name: AA-12 Drum
items.description: 12 gauge 20 rounds drum magazine for AA-12 shotgun

items.name: ACOG
items.description: The Acog is a rail mounted telescopic sight used to extend a shooters accuracy on medium to long range shots.

items.name: Air horn
items.description: Do your friends keep getting attacked? Be the hero and blow your air horn to make the infected come after you instead.

items.name: AK-74M
items.description: The AK-74M assault rifle is an upgrade of the AK 74 design with a slightly increased rate of fire. It fires a 5.45 x 39 mm round accurately at medium ranges.

items.name: AKM
items.description: The AKM is an assault rifle that was designed as a simplified version of the AK-47 rifle. It fires a 7.62 x 39 mm round and is relatively effective at medium ranges.

items.name: AKS-74U
items.description: The AKS-74U is a shortened gas operated carbine version of the AKS-74 assault rifle. It fires a 5.45 x 39 mm round and is very effective at medium ranges.

items.name: Captain Jack Frost
items.description: With a corncob pipe and a button nose...

items.name: Anaconda rounds
items.description: 6 rounds for the Anaconda

items.name: Antibiotics
items.description: Over the counter antibiotics that aid in curing colds and other minor ailments.

items.name: Arrow
items.description: Explosive bolt (arrow) for the crossbow

items.name: AWM .338 Magnum ammo
items.description: 8.6x70mm specialized rimless bottlenecked centerfire 10 rounds cartridge. Specifically designed for AWM rifle

items.name: AW Magnum
items.description: The AWM sniper rifle fires a custom .338W magnum round with devastating accuracy and effect. Each of its rounds deal a very high amount of damage.

items.name: B92
items.description: The B92 handgun was specially designed to fire a 9mm round and is reasonably effective agains close range targets.

items.name: B93R
items.description: The B93R handgun was designed to fire a 9mm parabellum round from a 20 round clip. It is a relatively effective weapon against close ranged targets.

items.name: Bag MRE
items.description: Meals Ready-to-Eat. Extremely convenient! An MRE can be eaten cold, right out of the pouch but they always taste better hot. Each serving size substantially relieves hunger and thirst

items.name: Bag of Chips
items.description: A bag of potato chips. Relieves minor hunger. BBQ Flavor!

items.name: Bandages
items.description: Common bandages which heal minor wounds and stops excessive bleeding.

items.name: Bandages DX
items.description: Medical bandages which heal moderate wounds and stops excessive bleeding.

items.name: Barb wire barricade
items.description: Drag this across a doorway to barricade the entrance leaving you safe inside, unless something is already inside with you!

items.name: Bat
items.description: Handy for those times when you need to beat the crap outta something or somebody.

items.name: Christmas Special
items.description: A yule tide treat

items.name: Binoculars
items.description: A great way to checkout if an area is safe before entering, keep an eye out for infected and bandits

items.name: BIZON
items.description: The Bizon submachine gun was designed to fire a 9 mm round from a 64 round magazine delivering accurate fire on close range targets.

items.name: Bizon 64 ammo
items.description: Bizon sub machine gun clip. Clip contains 64 rounds of 9x18mm ammo

items.name: Blackwater Long Range
items.description: The Blackwater Long Range scope is a 10x rail mounted scope designed to be used used at long ranges.

items.name: BLASER R93
items.description: The Blaser is a bolt action sniper rifle, designed to fire a .308W round from a 5 round clip. It is a highly accurate weapon at longer ranges.

items.name: Halloween Special!
items.description: A unique mask to celebrate the eve of the hallows. Eat, Drink and be Scary! Wuhahahahaaa!

items.name: Heavy Armor
items.description: Limited edition Armor Protection Level 5

items.name: Santa's Lil Helper
items.description: Makin presents for all the good girls and boys!

items.name: Santa's Sack
items.description: With presents for everyone! Well, mostly zombies. And bandits.

items.name: Butterfly Knife
items.description: A folding knife with two handles counter rotating around the blade so that when its closed the blade concealed

items.name: C01-Vaccine
items.description: An early prototype vaccine that when injected into your bloodstream fights off the infection and lowers blood toxicity levels. Its effectiveness is low however in comparison to later developed vaccines.

items.name: C04-Vaccine
items.description: A cure to the infection that was developed only weeks after the initial signs of the infection. Having had only a few weeks of production before the infected had taken over, supply is very low and demand is extremely high for these valuable vaccines.

items.name: Canoe Paddle
items.description: Wooden canoe paddle

items.name: Can of Ham
items.description: Mechanically separated Spiced Ham in a 5-ounce cans. May contain pig parts. Relieves moderate hunger.

items.name: Can of Pasta
items.description: A can of delicious Pasta-O's. Fortified with iron and vitamins. Low sugar and low fat. Suitable for Vegetarians. \r\nGluten Free

items.name: Can of soda
items.description: A carbonated beverage that when consumed quenches moderate thirst.

items.name: Can of Soup
items.description: A can of creamy tomato soup. No need to add water. Relieves moderate hunger.

items.name: Can of Tuna
items.description: Chunk lite savory tuna in water. Firm, flaky, fresh tasting that you can really tear into. Each serving relieves moderate hunger.

items.name: Small Backpack
items.description: A small backpack allowing some storage for essential items and equipment.

items.name: Chainsaw
items.description: Tear through undead and living alike with this fearsome household tool

items.name: Chocolate Bar
items.description: A milk chocolate candy bar. The finest in gourmet chocolate. Each serving size provides minor sustenance.

items.name: Beret Cover
items.description: This cover is a stylish military fashion statement which stands out smashingly in a combat zone!

items.name: .22 Caliber clip
items.description: 10 round, 22 cal ammo clip for Ruger pistols and rifles

items.name: Military Ruck
items.description: The mother of all backpacks. Carry 32 items at once!

items.name: Coconut Water
items.description: A bottle of delicious coconut water that when consumed quenches moderate thirst.

items.name: Colt Anaconda
items.description: Introduced in 1990, the Colt Anaconda is a large double action .44 caliber revolver featuring a six round cylinder, designed and produced by the Colt's Manufacturing Company

items.name: Compact Scope
items.description: The Swiss Compact Sight is a rail mounted scope used to extend a shooters accuracy at close and medium ranges.

items.name: Compound Crossbow
items.description: String drawn compound hunting crossbow for silent kills. Uses bow arrows for ammo

items.name: Cricket bat
items.description: Score some runs and crush some skulls!

items.name: Crowbar
items.description: A multi use household tool, useful for construction or surviving an apocalyptic event

items.name: Night vision civilian
items.description: Night vision for everyone, these affordable goggles allow you to see at night while remaining hidden in the darkness

items.name: CZ Scorpion EVO-3 ammo
items.description: 30 rounds of 9x19mm ammo for the CZ Scorpion EVO-3 submachine gun

items.name: Desert Eagle
items.description: The Desert Eagle handgun was designed to fire a .50 caliber round and deals a substancial amount of damage to targets at close ranges.

items.name: Desert Eagle ammo
items.description: .50 Action Express 7 round magazine for Desert Eagle handgun.

items.name: Double Barrel
items.description: Also known as Doubles or Broomsticks, this powerful shotgun allows two shots to be fired in quick succession before reloading

items.name: Electro-AID
items.description: A flavored drink with electrolytes that when consumed quenches moderate thirst.

items.name: Energy drink
items.description: A caffeine jump-start that when consumed quenches moderate thirst.

items.name: EVO-3
items.description: The EVO-3 submachine gun was designed to effectively fire 9 mm rounds from a 25 round magazine at close ranged targets at a very high rate of fire..

items.name: Famas
items.description: The Famas rifle is a gas operated standard infantry assault rifle, chambered for 5.56x45mm NATO round.

items.name: Famas 30 rounds
items.description: This is a 30 round magazine for the Famas that allows the shooter to carry more ammo.

items.name: Fire Axe
items.description: Standard issue axe used by firefighters to enter buildings and remove dangerous debris

items.name: ALICE Rucksack
items.description: Large backpack that fits everything you will need. The All-purpose Lightweight Individual Carrying Equipment. Dont forget the poo tickets!

items.name: Flare clip
items.description: Ammo for the flare gun

items.name: Flash Hider
items.description: The Muzzle FlashHider will lower the visual flash of a weapon when fired at normal or rapid speeds.

items.name: Flashlight
items.description: Flashlight for night time, also blinds other players and doubles as a last resort blunt object to bash in the heads of the infected

items.name: FN FiveSeven
items.description: The FN Five Seven is a standard issue handgun that was designed to fire a 5.7 mm round. It is an effective weapon against close range targets.

items.name: FN M249
items.description: The FN M249 machine gun fires a 5.56 mm round from a belt fed system. It is highly effective against targets at close and medium ranges.

items.name: FN P90
items.description: The FN P90 submachine gun was designed to fire 9 mm rounds from a large 50 round magazine. It is very effective on close range targets.

items.name: FN P90 S
items.description: The FN P90S submachine gun is a highly effective weapon that carries a unique 50 round magazine. It fires a standard 5.56 mm round.

items.name: FN SCAR CQC
items.description: The SCAR 16 CQC is an advanced assault rifle that fires standard 5.56 x 45 mm rounds effectively out to medium ranges.

items.name: FN SCAR NIGHT STALKER
items.description: The Scar 17 CQC Nightstalker is a assault rifle that fires standard 5.56 x 45 mm rounds effectively out to medium ranges.

items.name: Forward Grip
items.description: The bottom rail grip will allow the shooter more control of the weapon by use of the attached grip.

items.name: Frag Grenade
items.description: The fragmentation grenade is used to spray shrapnel upon exploding. Pull the pin and dont forget to throw it far.. Fire in the hole!

items.name: Frying Pan
items.description: Whether frying an egg or flattening a face, the common household frying pan has many uses

items.name: G36
items.description: The MTAC X36 assault rifle fires a 5.56 mm round. Its high rate of fire and medium recoil deliver a reasonably tight spread on impact of targets up to medium ranges.

items.name: G36 ammo
items.description: This is a 30 round magazine of 5.56x45mm specially designed for the G36 Assault Rifle

items.name: G36 C-Mag
items.description: "This is a 5.56x45mm, 100 round drum magazine specially designed for for the G36 Assault Rifle"

items.name: Garden Shears
items.description: Whether shortening hedges or heads these shears are sure to come in handy

items.name: M9 helmet black
items.description: The M9 helmet gives a good standard of head protection. This one in black.

items.name: M9 Helmet Forest 1
items.description: The M9 helmet gives a good standard of head protection. This one in a special forest pattern.

items.name: M9 Helmet Goggles 1
items.description: The M9 helmet gives a good standard of head protection. This one with goggles.

items.name: Golf Club
items.description: Best used for long drives. FORE!

items.name: Granola Bar
items.description: An organic granola bar. Each serving size helps relieve moderate hunger.

items.name: M9 Helmet Green
items.description: The M9 helmet gives a good standard of head protection. This one in green.

items.name: Hammer
items.description: Go with the funk, it is said. If you cant groove to this then you probably are dead. Stop, Hammer time.

items.name: M9 Helmet Urban
items.description: The M9 helmet gives a good standard of head protection. This one in Urban camo.

items.name: Hatchet
items.description: Cold-Steel, drop forged head with differential heat treatment. American Hickory Handle. Sharp corners will easily pierce the thickest skull and the razor sharp edge will shear through flesh and bone like it was white bread.

items.name: M9 Helmet with Goggles
items.description: The M9 helmet gives a good standard of head protection. This one with goggles.

items.name: Holographic
items.description: The Holosight is a rail mounted holographic sight used to extend a shooters accuracy at close and medium ranges.

items.name: Honey Badger
items.description: The Honey Badger submachine gun fires a .300 round at a medium rate of fire causing a good amount of damage on close range targets.

items.name: Large Backpack
items.description: Large Backpack

items.name: IMI TAR-21
items.description: The TAR-21 is an unique gas operated, rotating bolt, bullpup design assault rifle that fires a 5.56 x 45 mm round. It is extremely effective at close and medium range.

items.name: Instant Oatmeal
items.description: A heart warming way to start your day. Classic Maple and Brown Sugar. Relieves a moderate amount of hunger.

items.name: K Style NVG
items.description: Standard K style helmet rigged with NVG set up for night ops.

items.name: Jericho 9mm
items.description: The Jericho was designed as a universal self-loading pistol which fires a 9mm Parabellum round and is highly effective at close range.

items.name: Juice
items.description: A healthy drink that when consumed quenches moderate thirst.

items.name: Kobra
items.description: The Kobra is a rail mounted red dot sight used to extend a shooters accuracy at close and medium range targets.

items.name: Kruger .22 Rifle
items.description: Semi-automatic .22 Long Rifle with removable rotary magazine

items.name: Kruger Mini-14 clip
items.description: Standard size clip for the Kruger Mini-14

items.name: Boonie Cover
items.description: This Jungle Boonie cover is high speed, great for blending in and blocking out the sun and bugs but it won't stop bullets.

items.name: KT DECIDER
items.description: The KT Decider is a bull-pup shotgun design that has two magazine feed tubes, each side capable of holding 7 shells, for a total capacity of 14+1.

items.name: Boonie Desert
items.description: This boonie hat is great for desert ops, keeping you out of the sun and foiling those pesky bugs.

items.name: Large Kruger Rifle clip
items.description: 30 round rotary loaded mag

items.name: Boonie Green
items.description: While not a bullet stopper this boonie hat will keep you cool and in camo in the wild places.

items.name: M107
items.description: The M107 sniper rifle fires a .50 caliber round that strikes with deadly effect at extreme ranges. It has a 10 round clip that allows for a high rate of fire.

items.name: M16
items.description: The M16 rifle is a gas operated standard infantry assault rifle, chambered for 5.56x45mm NATO round.

items.name: M4
items.description: The M4 is a versitile, light weight, commando style assault rifle that is gas operated and fires a 5.56 x 45 mm round effectively in both close and medium ranges.

items.name: M4 Semi
items.description: The civilian M4 semi auto rifle, chambered for 5.56x45mm NATO round.

items.name: Boonie Hat Leather
items.description: This is the boonie hat that comes with a bit of sophistication. It is all leather, which is bound to be a hit, but it will not stop one!

items.name: Custom Guerilla
items.description: Custom designed guerilla field gear and body armor that allows for decent protection under fast moving conditions. Level 2 Protection

items.name: Gas Mask 2
items.description: A mask put over your face to protect from inhaling airborn pollutants and toxic gasses

items.name: Hard Hat
items.description: The traditional construction hard hat is just the ticket for knocking around old buildings and showing your enemies that you are tough!

items.name: IBA Sand
items.description: Special IBA release gear in Sand toned pattern with Level 2 protection.

items.name: K. Style Helmet
items.description: The good ol' Turtle Head is guaranteed to protect your brain. (Well, at least a little bit)\r\nLevel 2 Protection

items.name: MASADA
items.description: The Masada was designed for close combat operations and is a gas operated assault rifle that fires a chambered for 5.56x45mm NATO round. It is highly effective at close ranges.

items.name: MAUSER SP66
items.description: The Mauser SP66 sniper rifle was designed to fire a .308W round from a 5 round clip. It is highly accurate at long ranges when combined with a good scope.

items.name: MAUSER SRG DESERT
items.description: The Mauser SP66 Desert sniper rifle fires a .308W round.

items.name: Light Gear Forest
items.description: Light weight Level 1 protection in a Green Forest pattern.

items.name: Medium Kruger Rifle clip
items.description: Medium Kruger Rifle clip

items.name: Medkit
items.description: A standard field medical kit commonly used by Medics to heal wounded soldiers on the battlefield. Very effective

items.name: Metal Bat
items.description: Aluminum, will never rust. Heads bounce off faster. Not suitable for major league destruction.

items.name: Medium Backpack
items.description: A medium sized backpack with plenty of space and durability.

items.name: MiniSaints
items.description: Creamy, moist and delectable, MiniSaints are a delicious treat the whole family can enjoy! Best consumed while watching family movies, possibly involving snow and dogs.

items.name: MOSSBERG 590
items.description: The Mossberg 590 is a 12 gauge shotgun which has a 8 round storage tube. It is known to do an extremely high amount of damage at close range.

items.name: MP5/10
items.description: The MP5/10 submachine gun was designed to fire a 10 mm Auto rounds from a 30 round clip effectively against close ranged targets.

items.name: MP5 10mm Mag
items.description: 10mm Auto 30 rounds cartridge for MP5/10 submachine gun

items.name: MP7
items.description: The RA TR7 submachine gun is a special issue weapon that fires a 4.6 mm standard cartridge from a 30 round magazine. It is effective at close range targets.

items.name: MP7 30
items.description: HK 4.6×30mm 30 rounds magazine for MP7 submachine gun.

items.name: MP7 40
items.description: HK 4.6×30mm 40 rounds extended magazine for MP7 submachine gun.

items.name: MTV Forest
items.description: Limited edition MTV release Forest patterned gear with Level 2 protection.

items.name: Nail Gun
items.description: Commonly used in construction

items.name: Nail Strip
items.description: Connected strip of nails for use in the Nail Gun

items.name: Night vision military
items.description: Otherwise known as NVD's. These enhance light allowing the user to see in almost total darkness

items.name: Black Mask
items.description: The frightening Black Mask of Death, sure to give your enemies the chills.

items.name: Clown Mask
items.description: For all of you Jokers out there, we bring you the Clown Mask.

items.name: P90 50 rounds
items.description: P90 Compact Assault rifle rounds. 50 round clip

items.name: Pain killers
items.description: Over the counter pain killers that counter-act the effects of pain on the body.

items.name: Personal locker
items.description: Placeable personal storage unit

items.name: Pickaxe
items.description: Spiked head, flat chisel. Has a good chance of getting stuck in the skull. Awkward to use in tight quarters.

items.name: Pistol Flashlight
items.description: The Pistol Flashlight can be used to light dark areas and temporarily blind a shooters opponent.

items.name: Pistol laser
items.description: The Pistol Laser is mounted on the left side of a handgun and used to target the enemy with a laser light.

items.name: Pistol Silencer
items.description: Lowers the sound of pistols being fired

items.name: Pitchfork
items.description: Designed to move hay economically, its intimidating design suits it well to sticking some undead

items.name: PKM
items.description: The PKM machine gun was designed to fire a 7.62 mm rounds from a linked system and is reasonably accurate out to medium ranged targets.

items.name: Police Baton
items.description: Used by law enforcement as an aid in hand to hand combat, often to subdue unruly or resistant suspects

items.name: Police Baton w barbed wire recip
Power Drill
items.description: Battery powered and unconventional, the drill is quite effective at dispatching enemies in the grisliest way

items.name: PSO-1
items.description: The PSO1 is a rail mounted telescopic sight used to extend a shooters accuracy on medium to long range shots.

items.name: RA H23
items.description: The RA LMG36 was designed to fire a 7.62 mm standard round. This machine gun delivers a reasonable amount of accurate fire onto targets at medium ranges.

items.name: Range Finder
items.description: Need to know how far away something is? The range finder can be your best friend when sneaking around searching for survival items

items.name: Red Dot SP
items.description: The Swiss Red Dot Sight is a rail mounted sight used to extend a shooters accuracy at close and medium range targets

items.name: Reflex Sight
items.description: The Reflex Sight is a rail mounted scope used to extend a shooters accuracy at medium and long ranges.

items.name: Rifle Flashlight
items.description: The Flashlight can be used to light dark areas and temporarily blind a shooters opponent.

items.name: Rifle Laser
items.description: The Laser attachment mounts onto the side of a weapon and allows the shooter to mark the target with the laser.

items.name: Riot Shield
items.description: Its a riot shield! Hide behind it for safety

items.name: RPK-74
items.description: The RPK-74 machine gun fires a 5.45 mm high velocity round that delivers a reasonably accurate rate of fire onto targets out to medium ranges.

items.name: Ruger
items.description: Reliable and relatively common, the lower powered Kruger .22 is a household staple, allowing for low cost practice with firm control

items.name: SAIGA
items.description: The Saiga was developed as a 12 gauge shotgun with a 8 round storage tube. It inflicts a substancial amount of damage on targets at a close range.

items.name: Saiga 10 ammo
items.description: 12 gauge 10 rounds magazine for SAIGA shotgun

items.name: Fireman Helmet
items.description: The traditional Firefighters helmet has been saving men for years. Give it a try if you want to be different in the battlezone.

items.name: Gas Mask
items.description: A mask put over your face to protect from inhaling airborn pollutants and toxic gasses

items.name: Jason Mask
items.description: Hiding a monster, this mask strikes real horror in those who face it.

items.name: Shotgun shell 2x
items.description: 2 Shells for use in the double barrel

items.name: Shotgun shell 8x
items.description: 8 Shells for use in standard shotguns

items.name: Shovel
items.description: Practical AND deadly

items.name: SIG SAUER 556
items.description: The 556 is a gas operated, rotating bolt assault rifle that fires a 5.56 x 45 mm round and was designed for special operations. It is very effective out to medium ranges.

items.name: Sig Sauer P226
items.description: The SIG P226 is a full-sized, service-type pistol made by SIG Sauer. It been designed to fire a 9 x 19 mm round that makes it an effective weapon against close ranged targets.

items.name: Silencer
items.description: The Silencer will lower the sound of a weapons discharge when fired at normal or rapid speeds.

items.name: Shadow
items.description: This head gear was designed to not only make you look scary but also to protect your pretty face.

items.name: Skull Mask
items.description: The Skull Mask shows you know how to Grin and Bear it!

items.name: Slash Mask
items.description: While not just another pretty face, the Slash Mask is a cut above the rest! Get it and look the part of a killer.

items.name: SMG-20 ammo
items.description: 9x19mm Para 20 rounds magazine specially designed for Uzi and Veresk smg.

items.name: SMG Grip
items.description: The M 7 grip provides a shooter with more control and accuracy when firing a weapon at a high rate of fire.

items.name: Spiked Bat
items.description: Just your traditional baseball bat. With spikes. Razor sharp, sure to leave a mark.

items.name: STANAG 30
items.description: Standard 30 round clip of 5.45x45mm NATO rounds for use with the M4 and M16 Assault Rifles

items.name: STANAG 45
items.description: Medium 45 round clip of 5.45x45mm NATO rounds for use with the M4 and M16 Assault Rifles

items.name: STANAG 60
items.description: Large 60 round clip of 5.45x45mm NATO rounds for use with the M4 and M16

items.name: Stanag C-Mag
items.description: Maximum size100 round drum of 5.45x45mm NATO rounds for use with the M4 and M16 Assault Rifles

items.name: Standard Kruger .22 Rifle Clip
items.description: Standard issue 10 round rotary loaded magazine.

items.name: Standard Mosin Magazine
items.description: Standard internally fed 5 round magazine designed for use in the Mosin rifle

items.name: STI Eagle Elite .45 ACP
items.description: The STI Eagle Elite handgun is an upgraded version of the STI Eagle and is designed to fire a .45 ACP round effectively at close ranges.

items.name: SVD
items.description: The SVD sniper rifle was designed to fire a 7.62 mm round from a 10 round clip. Combined with an Optical Sniper Scope it is extremely accurate.

items.name: SVD ammo
items.description: 10 round magazine of 7.62x54mm ammo for the SVD (Dragunov Sniper Rifle)

items.name: Swiss Arms Scope 8x
items.description: The Swiss Arms multirail scope is a rail mounted scope used to extend a shooters accuracy at medium and long ranges.

items.name: Tactical Knife
items.description: A standard issue knife with an 8" fixed blade, this knife was first designed in 1985 for the United States Army and was later adapted by several other countries as well as mercenary groups throughout the world due to its sturdy design and stopping power.

items.name: Tactical Sniper Scope
items.description: 8x rail mounted scope designed to be used used atmedium ranges.

items.name: Teddy Bear backpack
items.description: Roman's favorite accessory

items.name: Time Capsule
items.description: Write a message and leave it anywhere in the world for others to find

items.name: UZI
items.description: The special issue UZI submachine gun is a open bolt, blow back design that fires 9 mm rounds from its magazine housed in the weapons pistol grip.

items.name: VERESK SR-2
items.description: The MTAC Flasher submachine gun was designed to fire a standard 9 mm round at a high rate of fire with reasonable accuracy at close range targets.

items.name: VSS-10
items.description: "Specially designed high power 9x39mm low velocity, high penetration subsonic round for VSS Vintorez sniper rifle. Standard 10 rounds magazine."

items.name: VSS-20
items.description: "Specially designed high power 9x39mm low velocity, high penetration subsonic round for VSS Vintorez sniper rifle. Extended 20 rounds magazine."

items.name: VSS VINTOREZ
items.description: The VSS Vintorez sniper rifle was designed to fire a 9 x 39 mm round using a gas operated, rotating bolt firing system. It is designed to be effective at medium distances.

items.name: Water 1L
items.description: A large bottle of water that when consumed quenches moderate thirst.

items.name: Water 375ml
items.description: A small bottle of water that when consumed quenches moderate thirst.

items.name: Wood shield barricade
items.description: Great for blocking doorways to keep out those pesky infected

items.name: Wrench
items.description: Loved by plumbers around the world, this hefty tool can easily collapse the skulls of your foes

items.name: Zombie Repellent
items.description: A spray on solution that when applied to the skin, it enters the blood stream and masks the smell of fresh blood.

items.name: Katana
items.description: Ancient deadly sharp Samurai weapon, hand made to cleave your foe cleanly in two. Or three...or four....

items.name: Blueprints Skin IMI TAR-21 Neon Purple
Blueprints Skin K Style NVG HOF
Blueprints Skin SIG SAUER 556 Neon Purple
